free_text: Particle production in the target-rapidity region from
The effective area of the targets was defined as 10*10
mm**2 by the counter placed in front of the target.
Target thicknesses ranged from 1.0 to 2.0 g/cm**2
The E-counters were made of NE110 plastic scintillators
100*100 mm**2 in area and 300 mm long.  Delta-E
counters made plastic scintillators, of dimension
45*45*20 mm**3 were used in the earlier experiments at
1.4-GeV/C on the carbon target and 4-GeV/C on the
carbon and Cu-targets, they were replaced by tinner
ones, of dimension 45*45*7 mm**3 for the later
experiments at 2.5-GeV/C on the Cu-target and 4-GeV/C
